message:
fix(net): harden buffer safety and input validation across networking modules

Database (db.c):
- Add early DSN length validation before parsing
- Improve text value handling with proper null termination

gRPC (grpc.c):
- Add null pointer check before memcpy for service metadata
- Clear buffers before use and truncate oversized names/targets

HTTP (http.c):
- Add http_memmem and http_memchr_byte safe memory search helpers
- Refactor multipart parsing to use uint8_t pointers for type safety

WebSocket, QUIC, Web:
- Input validation and buffer safety improvements

Tests:
- Add comprehensive coverage for oversized inputs, null arguments,
  string truncation, and multipart boundary parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
